title: PositivePayInstructionTypeValues
description: A request to provide the bank with a list of authorized payments for verification purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issue Payment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to issue a payment (e.g., check, ACH, or wire) that will be subject to positive pay verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Upload Issued Payment File Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to provide the bank with a list of authorized payments for verification purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Verification Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to match issued payments against the banks records and positive pay file to detect discrepancies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Review Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to manually review payments that do not match exactly or exceed allowed tolerances.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Approval Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to authorize a payment that has passed verification or has been manually reviewed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Rejection Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reject a payment automatically or manually when it does not match the authorized list.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Confirmation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to confirm the outcome of verification, including approved or rejected payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Update Positive Pay File Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify, add, or remove entries in the positive pay authorization file.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Positive Pay Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to automate verification and reporting of issued payments at predefined intervals.
